---
name: rjsf-test
description: Phase 5 — generate tests covering required fields, conditionals, submission, server errors, and accessibility
allowed-tools: [Read, Write, Glob]
---

# RJSF Test Generation — Phase 5

**Trigger:** `/rjsf-test` — or invoked automatically by `/rjsf-build` as Phase 5.

---

## Step 1 — Read Session & Generated Files

1. Resolve the active session path (see `references/session-pattern.md` Section 0). Let `sessionDir` = `.rjsf/sessions/{formName}/`. Read `{sessionDir}/session.json`.
2. If `phases["4"].status` is not `"completed"`: stop and say: "Phase 4 (Execution) must be completed first. Run `/rjsf-execute`."
3. Read `{sessionDir}/form-plan.md` (FormPlan — for field labels, conditional rules, schema constraints).
4. Read `{sessionDir}/requirements-brief.md` (RequirementsBrief — for edge case flags).
5. Read `<outputPath>/schema.ts` and `<outputPath>/index.tsx` from session.json's `outputPath`.

---

## Step 2 — Generate Test File

Generate `<outputPath>/<FormName>.test.tsx` with the structure below.

**Include ONLY the test `describe` blocks whose corresponding edge case flag is `true` in the RequirementsBrief.** Always include: required field validation, field validation rules, form submission (success + reject), and accessibility tests — these are unconditional.

```typescript
// <FormName>.test.tsx
// Generated by rjsf-agent. Run with: npx vitest or npx jest
import React from 'react';
import { render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/react';
import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event';
import { axe, toHaveNoViolations } from 'jest-axe';
import { <FormName> } from './index';

expect.extend(toHaveNoViolations);

const noop = () => {};

// ─── Required Field Validation ────────────────────────────────────────────────
// ALWAYS include. Generate one `it` block per required field from schema.ts.
describe('<FormName> — required field validation', () => {
  it('shows an error when <requiredFieldLabel> is empty on submit', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit/i }));
    expect(await screen.findByText(/<requiredFieldLabel>.*required/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
  // Add one it() per required field from schema.ts required[] array.
});

// ─── Per-Field Validation Rules ────────────────────────────────────────────────
// ALWAYS include. Generate one `it` block per field that has minLength/maxLength/pattern/minimum/maximum.
describe('<FormName> — field validation rules', () => {
  it('shows an error when <fieldLabel> is shorter than <minLength>', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldLabel>/i), 'ab');
    await userEvent.tab(); // blur
    expect(await screen.findByText(/at least \d+ character/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
  // Add one it() per validation rule found in schema.ts.
});

// ─── Form Submission — Success (ALWAYS INCLUDE) ───────────────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — form submission', () => {
  it('calls onSubmit with the correct data shape when all required fields are filled', async () => {
    const onSubmit = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined);
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={onSubmit} />);
    // Fill every required field with a valid value
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<requiredFieldLabel>/i), '<validValue>');
    // Add userEvent calls for every other required field
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit/i }));
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(onSubmit).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        expect.objectContaining({ <fieldKey>: '<validValue>' })
      );
    });
  });

  it('does not call onSubmit when required fields are missing', async () => {
    const onSubmit = jest.fn();
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={onSubmit} />);
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit/i }));
    expect(onSubmit).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
  });
});

// ─── Conditional Field Visibility (include if any conditions in FormPlan) ─────
// Generate one `describe` block per conditional rule in form-plan.md.
describe('<FormName> — conditional field: <dependentFieldLabel>', () => {
  it('is hidden on initial render', () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    expect(screen.queryByLabelText(/<dependentFieldLabel>/i)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('appears when <triggerFieldLabel> equals "<triggerValue>"', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.selectOptions(screen.getByLabelText(/<triggerFieldLabel>/i), '<triggerValue>');
    expect(await screen.findByLabelText(/<dependentFieldLabel>/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('disappears when <triggerFieldLabel> changes to a non-triggering value', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.selectOptions(screen.getByLabelText(/<triggerFieldLabel>/i), '<triggerValue>');
    await userEvent.selectOptions(screen.getByLabelText(/<triggerFieldLabel>/i), '<otherValue>');
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.queryByLabelText(/<dependentFieldLabel>/i)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
    });
  });
});

// ─── Server Error Mapping (include if server_error_mapping: true) ─────────────
describe('<FormName> — server error mapping', () => {
  it('displays the server error message on the correct field', async () => {
    const onSubmit = jest.fn().mockRejectedValue({
      fieldErrors: { <fieldKey>: '<server error message>' }
    });
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={onSubmit} />);
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<requiredFieldLabel>/i), '<validValue>');
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit/i }));
    expect(await screen.findByText(/<server error message>/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});

// ─── Cross-Field Validation (include if cross_field_validation: true) ─────────
describe('<FormName> — cross-field validation', () => {
  it('shows an error when <fieldB> violates its constraint relative to <fieldA>', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldALabel>/i), '<valueA>');
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldBLabel>/i), '<invalidValueB>');
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit/i }));
    expect(await screen.findByText(/<cross-field error message pattern>/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});

// ─── Edit Mode Pre-Population (include if edit_mode: true) ────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — edit mode', () => {
  it('pre-populates fields with the provided formData', () => {
    const testData = { <fieldKey>: '<testValue>' /* add all fields from types.ts */ };
    render(<<FormName> formData={testData} onSubmit={noop} />);
    expect(
      (screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldLabel>/i) as HTMLInputElement).value
    ).toBe('<testValue>');
  });
});

// ─── Async Field Validation (include if async_field_validation: true) ─────────
describe('<FormName> — async field validation', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    global.fetch = jest.fn();
  });

  it('shows an error message when the API reports the value is taken', async () => {
    (global.fetch as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({
      ok: true,
      json: () => Promise.resolve({ available: false }),
    });
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    const input = screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldLabel>/i);
    await userEvent.type(input, 'taken-value');
    await userEvent.tab(); // blur triggers debounced check
    expect(await screen.findByText(/already taken/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('shows no error when the API reports the value is available', async () => {
    (global.fetch as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({
      ok: true,
      json: () => Promise.resolve({ available: true }),
    });
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    const input = screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldLabel>/i);
    await userEvent.type(input, 'available-value');
    await userEvent.tab();
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.queryByText(/already taken/i)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
    });
  });
});

// ─── Multi-Step Navigation (include if multi_step: true) ─────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — multi-step navigation', () => {
  it('shows a validation error and does not advance when a step-1 required field is empty', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /next/i }));
    expect(await screen.findByText(/<step1RequiredField>.*required/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
    expect(screen.queryByText(/<step2UniqueLabel>/i)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('advances to step 2 after all step-1 required fields are filled', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<step1RequiredFieldLabel>/i), '<validValue>');
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /next/i }));
    expect(await screen.findByLabelText(/<step2FieldLabel>/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('preserves field values when navigating back to a previous step', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<step1FieldLabel>/i), 'test value');
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /next/i }));
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /back/i }));
    expect(
      (screen.getByLabelText(/<step1FieldLabel>/i) as HTMLInputElement).value
    ).toBe('test value');
  });
});

// ─── Draft Save (include if draft_save: true) ─────────────────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — draft save', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    localStorage.clear();
  });

  it('saves form data to localStorage on every change', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldLabel>/i), '<testValue>');
    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('<FormName>_draft') ?? '{}');
    expect(saved.<fieldKey>).toBe('<testValue>');
  });

  it('restores form data from localStorage on mount', () => {
    localStorage.setItem('<FormName>_draft', JSON.stringify({ <fieldKey>: '<savedValue>' }));
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    expect(
      (screen.getByLabelText(/<fieldLabel>/i) as HTMLInputElement).value
    ).toBe('<savedValue>');
  });
});

// ─── Computed Fields (include if computed_fields: true) ───────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — computed fields', () => {
  it('automatically updates <computedFieldLabel> when source fields change', async () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.clear(screen.getByLabelText(/<sourceFieldALabel>/i));
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<sourceFieldALabel>/i), '5');
    await userEvent.clear(screen.getByLabelText(/<sourceFieldBLabel>/i));
    await userEvent.type(screen.getByLabelText(/<sourceFieldBLabel>/i), '10');
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(
        (screen.getByLabelText(/<computedFieldLabel>/i) as HTMLInputElement).value
      ).toBe('<expectedComputedValue>');
    });
  });
});

// ─── View Mode (include if view_mode: true) ───────────────────────────────────
describe('<FormName>View — read-only display', () => {
  it('renders all field values from the provided data object', () => {
    // Import <FormName>View from './index' or './<FormName>View' as generated
    const { <FormName>View } = require('./index');
    const testData = { <fieldKey>: '<testValue>' };
    render(<<FormName>View data={testData} />);
    expect(screen.getByText('<testValue>')).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});

// ─── Role-Based Visibility (include if role_based: true) ─────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — role-based field visibility', () => {
  it('hides admin-only fields for non-admin users', () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} role="user" />);
    expect(screen.queryByLabelText(/<adminOnlyFieldLabel>/i)).not.toBeInTheDocument();
  });

  it('shows admin-only fields for admin users', () => {
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} role="admin" />);
    expect(screen.getByLabelText(/<adminOnlyFieldLabel>/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});

// ─── Nested Arrays (include if nested_arrays: true) ──────────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — nested array field', () => {
  it('renders existing inner array items as tags', () => {
    const data = { <outerArrayKey>: [{ <innerArrayKey>: 'tag1' }] };
    render(<<FormName> formData={data} onSubmit={noop} />);
    expect(screen.getByText('tag1')).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});

// ─── Array Reorder (include if array_reorder: true) ──────────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — array item reorder', () => {
  it('renders the drag handle for each array item', () => {
    const data = { <arrayFieldKey>: [{ name: 'Item 1' }, { name: 'Item 2' }] };
    render(<<FormName> formData={data} onSubmit={noop} />);
    const handles = screen.getAllByLabelText(/drag to reorder/i);
    expect(handles).toHaveLength(2);
  });
});

// ─── File Upload (include if file_upload_server: true) ───────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — file upload', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    global.fetch = jest.fn();
  });

  it('calls the upload endpoint when a file is selected and stores the returned URL', async () => {
    (global.fetch as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({
      ok: true,
      json: () => Promise.resolve({ url: 'https://example.com/file.pdf' }),
    });
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    const fileInput = screen.getByLabelText(/<fileFieldLabel>/i);
    const file = new File(['content'], 'test.pdf', { type: 'application/pdf' });
    await userEvent.upload(fileInput, file);
    await waitFor(() => {
      expect(screen.getByText(/https:\/\/example\.com\/file\.pdf/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
    });
  });

  it('shows an error message when the upload request fails', async () => {
    (global.fetch as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({
      ok: false,
      statusText: 'Internal Server Error',
    });
    render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    const fileInput = screen.getByLabelText(/<fileFieldLabel>/i);
    const file = new File(['content'], 'test.pdf', { type: 'application/pdf' });
    await userEvent.upload(fileInput, file);
    expect(await screen.findByText(/upload failed/i)).toBeInTheDocument();
  });
});

// ─── Accessibility (ALWAYS INCLUDE) ──────────────────────────────────────────
describe('<FormName> — accessibility', () => {
  it('has no axe violations on initial render', async () => {
    const { container } = render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    const results = await axe(container);
    expect(results).toHaveNoViolations();
  });

  it('has no axe violations when validation errors are displayed', async () => {
    const { container } = render(<<FormName> onSubmit={noop} />);
    await userEvent.click(screen.getByRole('button', { name: /submit/i }));
    await screen.findByRole('alert');
    const results = await axe(container);
    expect(results).toHaveNoViolations();
  });
});
```

---

## Step 3 — Write File & Update Session

1. Write the test file to `<outputPath>/<FormName>.test.tsx`.
2. Update `{sessionDir}/session.json`:
   - `phases["5"].status = "completed"`
   - `phases["5"].completedAt = <ISO timestamp>`
   - `phases["5"].artifactPath = "<outputPath>/<FormName>.test.tsx"`
   - Write the full session.json (not a partial merge).

---

## Step 4 — End-of-Phase Prompt

After writing, output exactly:

> "Tests written to `<outputPath>/<FormName>.test.tsx`.
>
> **Your form is complete.**
>
> - Run tests: `npx vitest <outputPath>` or `npx jest <outputPath>`
> - Make changes: `/rjsf-iterate \"describe what to change\"`
> - Build another form: `/rjsf-build`
> - Check session: `/rjsf-status`"
